description: Baseline smoke workflow runs and reports deterministic status
steps: Run bash scripts/agent/smoke.sh
Confirm output indicates PASS or actionable missing-runner warnings
Read .agent/handoff.md and active execution plan
Implement next smallest verifiable slice of the pending work
evidence: Implemented the 3-7 fixed-layout picture-book pipeline slice with additive schema/config updates, layered image roles, preview rendering, and passing lint/test/quality checks (2026-03-06).

description: Add a pre-checkout character description, generation loop, and explicit character selection flow
steps: Extend order/book/API state with characterDescription plus candidate/select endpoints
Block checkout until a current character reference is approved and keep candidate generation capped at 10 attempts per book
evidence: pnpm --filter @book/api test (PASS); pnpm --filter @book/web test (PASS); bash scripts/agent/smoke.sh (PASS); bash scripts/agent/quality.sh (PASS)

description: Extend beat and page planning with scene continuity metadata and persisted image planning artifacts
steps: Add sceneId and sceneVisualDescription to beat/page planning outputs and persisted types
Persist scene-plan.json and image-plan.json and resolve up to 2 earlier same-scene page references for each page job

description: Replace Fal/Kontext/Fill image generation with OpenAI gpt-image-1.5 generate/edit workflows
steps: Remove Fal runtime config and provider wiring in favor of an OpenAI image model defaulting to gpt-image-1.5
Generate character_candidate images with images.generate and page_art with images.edit using high-fidelity same-scene references

description: Retarget render, review, and status flows to the new character_reference and page_art assets
steps: Update check-images, finalize, reviewer payloads, and parent book payloads to use page_art and character_reference roles
Update renderer inputs, docs, and tests so preview/PDF generation and manual review work end to end on the OpenAI pipeline

description: Revitalize the frontend and add an internal review console with explicit review-case workflow for needs_review books
steps: Refactor the web app into parent and reviewer areas with typed API access and reviewer route gating
Add review-case persistence, reviewer APIs/actions, current-attempt asset selection, and resume/retry workflow so manual review is operational
evidence: Implemented route-based parent/reviewer web flows, GET /v1/session and /v1/review/* APIs, review_cases/review_events persistence, current-attempt image/artifact semantics, resume/retry workflow, and reviewer docs. Verification: bash scripts/agent/smoke.sh => PASS; bash scripts/agent/quality.sh => PASS; pnpm --filter @book/web build => PASS; pnpm --filter @book/api test => PASS; pnpm --filter @book/cdk test => PASS (2026-03-06).

description: Migrate the web app to a clean-product Tailwind and shadcn UI system with a route-based parent flow
steps: Adopt Tailwind CSS plus shadcn and shared clean-product primitives across parent and reviewer screens
Replace the single parent dashboard route with routed create, checkout, and current-book flows while preserving current API contracts and persisted keys
evidence: Implemented a Tailwind v4 + shadcn clean-product UI foundation for apps/web, replaced the single parent dashboard with routed /, /create, /checkout, and /books/current flows backed by a persisted ParentFlowProvider, and restyled /verify, /review, and /review/cases/:caseId on the same primitive layer without changing API contracts. Verification 2026-03-08: bash scripts/agent/smoke.sh => PASS; bash scripts/agent/quality.sh => PASS; bash scripts/agent/e2e.sh => WARN only (no runner detected, fallback allowed); pnpm --filter @book/web test => PASS; pnpm --filter @book/web build => PASS; pnpm run deploy:web:dev => PASS; live CloudFront validation on https://dazfa7oc8fu6h.cloudfront.net confirmed the new create flow on desktop/mobile and produced screenshots under output/playwright/.

description: Merge master into codex/picture-book-fixed-layout without losing story-pipeline hardening or fixed-layout picture-book functionality
steps: Merge master into codex/picture-book-fixed-layout and manually resolve overlapping API, worker, renderer, domain, and infra files
Preserve master's story-pipeline hardening and mock-run authorization alongside the picture-book fixed-layout pipeline, then verify with quality gates
evidence: bash scripts/agent/quality.sh => PASS; pnpm ops:provider-smoke => PASS; master story-pipeline hardening and picture-book fixed-layout pipeline merged with mock-run authorization preserved; live mark-paid validation reached story generation but image generation is externally blocked by Fal exhausted balance

description: Core docs and index reflect current architecture and workflow
steps: Update docs/PRODUCT.md docs/ARCHITECTURE.md docs/SECURITY.md docs/RELIABILITY.md
Ensure docs/index.md links all relevant docs

description: Replace starter tasks with project-specific acceptance criteria
steps: Infer or collect real requirements
Encode them as explicit tasks in .agent/feature_list.json
evidence: Replaced the obsolete Fal-focused failing task with four concrete OpenAI image-pipeline tasks in .agent/feature_list.json on 2026-03-15.
